top_signals.title: HDFC Bank Shares Drop as Governance Report Deepens CEO’s Woes
top_signals.summary: Shares of HDFC Bank fell in Mumbai trading on Wednesday after a media report alleged India’s largest private sector lender paid higher interest to a state-owned company, adding to Chief Executive Officer Sashidhar Jagdishan’s recent list of troubles.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Thai beer heir sexual abuse allegations ignite rare public reckoning
top_signals.summary: The high-profile case within the wealthy Thai beer brewing family has prompted a wave of painful accounts from survivors of unconnected abuse in the conservative country.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
